intro.label: Intro
intro.statement: I build digital products where engineering precision becomes visual atmosphere.
intro.supporting: This project is built as a simple, cohesive system with the focus kept on structure, rhythm, and the work itself. The visual motif supports the content instead of competing with it.
intro.stackHeading: Frontend systems, interaction tooling, and product delivery technologies I use in practice.
intro.stackHint: Hover any technology to wake a leaf on the flower.

projects.title: Good People
projects.category: Real estate agency website in Novosibirsk
projects.summary: A trust-led real estate website built around legal safety, personal guidance, and conversion-focused storytelling.

projects.title: Northstar Index
projects.summary: A quiet data product where dense reporting is shaped into a calm, readable decision surface.

projects.title: Atelier Archive
projects.summary: An e-commerce experience built like a publication, balancing conversion with restraint and atmosphere.

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.quote: Every interface should feel authored, not assembled.
philosophy.supporting: Minimalism is precision in the details. Hierarchy, rhythm, and typography create a calm interface.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Available for projects in product design, creative direction, and frontend development.
